ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRat C2 via legitimate cloud-storage APIs (Dropbox / pCloud / Yandex / Box)
ucs.description: Hunts non-browser Windows processes (script hosts, LOLBins, scratch-folder binaries) issuing outbound traffic to the public APIs of pCloud, Dropbox, Yandex Disk, Box and Mail.ru — the bidirectional web-service C2 channel that has been the defining trait of ScarCruft's RokRat / DOGCALL / Konni implants since 2017. Pure cloud-API egress from Edge/Chrome/Slack is allowed; the same egress from rundll32, mshta, wscript, regsvr32, powershell or AppData-resident binaries is the actor signal.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dest_ip values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest=*api.pcloud.com OR All_Traffic.dest=*eapi.pcloud.com OR All_Traffic.dest=*content.dropboxapi.com OR All_Traffic.dest=*api.dropboxapi.com OR All_Traffic.dest=*cloud-api.yandex.net OR All_Traffic.dest=*webdav.yandex.ru OR All_Traffic.dest=*api.box.com OR All_Traffic.dest=*upload.box.com OR All_Traffic.dest=*cloud.mail.ru) by All_Traffic.src host All_Traffic.app All_Traffic.process_name _time span=1h
| `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)`
| eval proc=lower(coalesce(process_name,app))
| where match(proc,"(?i)(rundll32|regsvr32|mshta|wscript|cscript|hh|odbcconf|installutil|certutil|powershell|pwsh|cmd|forfiles|msbuild)\.exe$") OR match(proc,"\\\\(users\\\\public|appdata\\\\(local|roaming)\\\\temp|programdata)\\\\")
| join type=inner host [| tstats summariesonly=true values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent_process from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name | rename Processes.dest as host Processes.process_name as proc]
| stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(dest) as cloud_dest values(dest_ip) as dest_ip values(cmdline) as cmdline values(parent_process) as parent by host src proc
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// APT37 RokRat — non-browser process talking to known RokRat cloud-API hosts
let rokrat_hosts = dynamic([
    "api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com",
    "content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com",
    "cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru",
    "api.box.com","upload.box.com",
    "cloud.mail.ru"
]);
let rokrat_loaders = dynamic([
    "rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe",
    "hh.exe","odbcconf.exe","installutil.exe","certutil.exe",
    "powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","forfiles.exe","msbuild.exe"
]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
| where RemoteUrl has_any (rokrat_hosts)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (rokrat_loaders)
   or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\ProgramData\")
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
          RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort,
          Process = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ProcessFolder = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ProcessCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
          SHA256 = InitiatingProcessSHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37 RokRat — Sentinel (ASIM network + Sysmon EID 3 fallback)
let rokrat_hosts = dynamic([
    "api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com",
    "content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com",
    "cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru",
    "api.box.com","upload.box.com",
    "cloud.mail.ru"
]);
let rokrat_loaders = dynamic([
    "rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe",
    "hh.exe","odbcconf.exe","installutil.exe","certutil.exe",
    "powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","forfiles.exe","msbuild.exe"
]);
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(Url) or isnotempty(DstHostname)
| extend Dest = tolower(coalesce(DstHostname, Url))
| where Dest has_any (rokrat_hosts)
| extend Proc = tolower(tostring(split(ActingProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where Proc in~ (rokrat_loaders)
   or ActingProcessName has_any (@"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\ProgramData\")
| where SrcUsername !endswith "$"
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, SrcUsername, Dest, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber,
          ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft RokRat C2 via Cloud Storage APIs
id: 7c1f4a3e-6b2a-4ad0-a9c1-7c0e3a8f9b41
status: experimental
description: Detects RokRat / DOGCALL bidirectional C2 over pCloud, Dropbox, Yandex Disk, Box and Mail.ru cloud storage APIs from non-browser Windows processes — the defining ScarCruft (APT37) C2 pattern.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://www.welivesecurity.com/2019/05/13/scarcruft-back-rokrat-malware/
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1102.002
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_proc:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\hh.exe'
      - '\odbcconf.exe'
      - '\installutil.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
  selection_dst:
    DestinationHostname|contains:
      - 'api.pcloud.com'
      - 'eapi.pcloud.com'
      - 'content.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'api.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'cloud-api.yandex.net'
      - 'webdav.yandex.ru'
      - 'api.box.com'
      - 'upload.box.com'
      - 'cloud.mail.ru'
  condition: selection_proc and selection_dst
falsepositives:
  - Custom in-house automation scripted against the same cloud APIs (rare, allowlist by hash)
level: high
ucs.rationale: RokRat is the signature implant of APT37 / ScarCruft / Reaper / InkySquid (also tracked by Mandiant as TEMP.Reaper) and has used legitimate cloud-storage APIs as its bidirectional C2 channel across at least seven campaigns (2017-2024) — pCloud and Yandex Disk in particular are near-unique to this actor and Konni-family relatives. The detection deliberately keeps Edge/Chrome/Slack/OneDrive on the a

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActingProcessCommandLine` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 weaponized LNK execution chain — explorer-spawned mshta/powershell decoding embedded payload
ucs.description: Hunts the LNK-driven execution chain ScarCruft has used in Operation Daybreak follow-ups, the 'RoKRAT via LNK' (M2RAT) campaigns, and 2023-2024 South Korean / NK-defector targeting: a user double-clicks a weaponized .lnk that explorer.exe launches, which in turn spawns mshta/powershell/cmd carrying the shellcode-extraction one-liner (FindStr/Get-Content offset reads, base64 / XOR decode of an embedded second-stage), often dropping to %Public% or %ProgramData%.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_path) as image values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="explorer.exe" Processes.process_name IN ("mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name _time span=1h
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| eval cmd_lc=lower(cmdline)
| where match(cmd_lc,"\.lnk")
   OR match(cmd_lc,"(frombase64string|::frombase64|-encodedcommand|-enc\s|invoke-expression|iex\s)")
   OR match(cmd_lc,"(get-content|gc\s).*-totalcount|select.*-skip\s+\d+")
   OR match(cmd_lc,"findstr\s+.*\.lnk")
   OR match(cmd_lc,"\\\\(users\\\\public|programdata|appdata\\\\(local|roaming)\\\\temp)\\\\")
| where NOT match(user,"(?i)(\$|system|local service|network service)$")
| stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(cmdline) as cmdline values(image) as image values(parent_cmd) as parent_cmd by dest user process_name parent_process_name
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// APT37 ScarCruft — LNK -> explorer -> script-host decode chain
let stage_bins = dynamic(["mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe"
| where FileName in~ (stage_bins)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| where cmd has ".lnk"
     or cmd has_any ("frombase64string", "-encodedcommand", " -enc ", " -ec ", "invoke-expression", "iex ")
     or cmd matches regex @"(?i)(get-content|gc\s).*(-totalcount|-tail|-skip)\s+\d+"
     or cmd matches regex @"(?i)findstr\s+.{0,40}\.lnk"
     or cmd has_any (@"\users\public\", @"\programdata\", @"\appdata\local\temp\", @"\appdata\roaming\")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Child = FileName, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256
// Pivot: same host writes a .bat/.dll/.exe to %Public%/%ProgramData% within 5 minutes (RokRat staging)
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\Users\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\")
    | where FileName endswith ".dll" or FileName endswith ".exe"
         or FileName endswith ".bat" or FileName endswith ".vbs"
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceName, DroppedFile = FileName, DropPath = FolderPath
  ) on DeviceName
| where isnull(DropTime) or DropTime between (Timestamp .. Timestamp + 5m)
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37 ScarCruft — Sentinel (SecurityEvent 4688 + ASIM fallback)
let stage_bins = dynamic(["mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where ParentProcessName endswith "explorer.exe"
| extend ChildExe = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where ChildExe in~ (stage_bins)
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend cmd = tolower(CommandLine)
| where cmd has ".lnk"
     or cmd has_any ("frombase64string", "-encodedcommand", " -enc ", " -ec ", "invoke-expression", "iex ")
     or cmd matches regex @"(?i)(get-content|gc\s).*(-totalcount|-tail|-skip)\s+\d+"
     or cmd matches regex @"(?i)findstr\s+.{0,40}\.lnk"
     or cmd has_any (@"\users\public\", @"\programdata\", @"\appdata\local\temp\", @"\appdata\roaming\")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ChildExe, NewProcessName,
          CommandLine, ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft Weaponized LNK Execution Chain
id: 9d8b2f15-3ac7-4e02-9fc4-a51d77c0e7b2
status: experimental
description: Detects the weaponized-LNK delivery chain used by APT37/ScarCruft to deliver RokRat / M2RAT — explorer.exe spawns mshta, powershell, cmd, wscript or rundll32 with a command line that references a .lnk path, base64/encoded payload, byte-offset content reads, or staging into %Public%/%ProgramData%/%Temp%.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://asec.ahnlab.com/en/scarcruft-m2rat/
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218.005
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\explorer.exe'
  child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
  suspicious_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '.lnk'
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - ' -enc '
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
      - 'IEX '
      - 'Get-Content'
      - 'findstr'
      - '\Users\Public\'
      - '\ProgramData\'
      - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
      - '\AppData\Roaming\'
  condition: parent and child and suspicious_cmd
falsepositives:
  - IT-deployed shortcuts that intentionally spawn powershell/cmd via Group Policy startup folders (rare, allowlist by parent path)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Weaponized LNK files are APT37's preferred initial-access vector since at least 2022 (Operation Daybreak descendants, M2RAT campaigns reported by AhnLab/ASEC, Cisco Talos 'Group123' research). The chain is distinctive: explorer.exe launches the LNK, which uses a single-line cmd/mshta/powershell invocation to read shellcode out of itself via FindStr or Get-Content byte-offset tricks, decode it, and
